title: psoralea forbesiae
intro: Psoralea forbesiae, also known as the "Kodiak or Four-angled psoralea", is a perennial plant native to the coastal regions of Alaska and the western United States. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as rheumatism, arthritis, and skin conditions due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Psoralea forbesiae can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
